Class VisaOfficeSystem

java.lang.Object
classes.VisaOfficeSystem
public class VisaOfficeSystem extends Object
Core system class managing all visa processing operations.
Author:
Hassan Abdus Salam, Abdul Hadi

    dm
    an instance of DataManager class to load and store and data.

    • processApplication

      public void processApplication(Application application, Status status)
      Updates the status of the given application. The status cannot be changed if the application is already APPROVED or REJECTED, and the new status cannot be PENDING.
      Parameters:
      application -
      status -

    • displayAssignedApplications

      public void displayAssignedApplications(int officerID)
      Displays all applications assigned to the officer with the given ID
      Parameters:
      officerID -

    • displayApplicationTabular

      public void displayApplicationTabular(Application a)
      Formats and prints a single application as one table row. Intended to be called after a header line has been printed.
      Parameters:
      a -

    • displayApplicationsTabular

      public void displayApplicationsTabular(ArrayList<Application> app)
      displays Applications in tabular form, takes an arraylist as an argument.
      Parameters:
      app -
